subject: Painting bids in 24 hours for Gardon
body:
Hi Shane,

Gardon's range — MEC, Prairie Mountain CU, Seven Oaks PAC — means your bid book hits a lot of spec types. Most painting subs slow that down with week-long turnarounds and bloated estimator-overhead numbers.

Lumi (our AI estimating agent) returns a 95%-detailed bid in 24 hours, at least 13% lower than human-estimated subs. Plus Lumia auto-status during the job and pro cleanup at handoff with no surface damage.

Want us added to Gardon's painting bid list?
cta: Want us added to Gardon's painting bid list?
signals_used: Gardon = ~40 yrs Manitoba/Western Canada; MEC, Prairie Mountain CU, Seven Oaks PAC; COR + Gold Seal.
